name: Rotary Position Embedding (RoPE)
task: Create /tmp/eval_rope/rope.py with a function apply_rope(x, position, base=10000.0) that applies Rotary Position Embedding to a 1D vector x of even length d, at integer position. The standard formulation: pair adjacent dimensions as (x[2i], x[2i+1]); each pair is rotated by angle theta_i = position / base^(2i/d). Specifically the rotated pair is (x[2i]*cos(theta_i) - x[2i+1]*sin(theta_i), x[2i]*sin(theta_i) + x[2i+1]*cos(theta_i)). Return a new list of length d. Raise ValueError if d is odd. Pure Python.
